[Bash]: 98:def bundled_skills_dir() -> Path:
99-    """Return the directory of skills bundled with Sorcar.
100-
101-    These are the official Claude Code plugins downloaded into
102-    ``kiss/agents/claude_skills`` by ``scripts/fetch-claude-skills.sh``
103-    (each plugin holds skills at ``<plugin>/skills/<name>/SKILL.md``).
104-    The directory may be absent in development checkouts.
105-    """
106-    return Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent / "claude_skills"

```python
finish(result='`bundled_skills_dir()` in `src/kiss/agents/sorcar/skills.py` returns the `agents/claude_skills` directory relative to the kiss package — i.e., `Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent / "claude_skills"`, which resolves to `src/kiss/agents/claude_skills`. Content is downloaded into it by the script `scripts/fetch-claude-skills.sh`, which fetches the official Claude Code plugins (each plugin holding skills at `<plugin>/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`). The directory may be absent in development checkouts.')
```

[finish]: `bundled_skills_dir()` in `src/kiss/agents/sorcar/skills.py` returns the `agents/claude_skills` directory relative to the kiss package — i.e., `Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent / "claude_skills"`, which resolves to `src/kiss/agents/claude_skills`. Content is downloaded into it by the script `scripts/fetch-claude-skills.sh`, which fetches the official Claude Code plugins (each plugin holding skills at `<plugin>/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`). The directory may be absent in development checkouts.
